raw_consumer_statement:
I got an alert of XXXX purchases early in the morning which I did not approve or did, I called customer service immediately to report the charges made on a home depot in Colorado they also changed my Address and email at that time, some one order online, I reported the charges as soon as they happened and they still said it was me who made the charges, I explained to them that I have never been in Colorado and I live in Arizona, I have never used my credit card near Colorado but they did not want to help me and still charged me for the XXXX purchases made in Colorado, this was never resolved I spend hour and hours calling them, I even had to fail work in order to call them since they can only answer me during office hours and I work office hours. 

I never got this resolved and I ended up paying this, I need help resolving this and getting my money back that I works so hard to get. 

The purchases where as follows {$810.00} and {$1300.00} both made on XX/XX/scrub>/2023, I called them that morning at around XXXX XXXX  my time in Arizona, and I told them this was not me and to cancel them immediately since I was being ID fraud by someone in Colorado based on the information provided by the rep and also since they changed my address online to a Colorado address
